tasks.title: Heartbeat session spawning
tasks.notes: Completed 2026-03-28. Three-stage launcher with opus coordinator, streaming monitoring, effort levels, fallback models. First autonomous beat validated.

tasks.title: CC feature optimization — full Claude Code power utilization
tasks.notes: Features deployed: --effort levels, --fallback-model, --output-format stream-json, --append-system-prompt, four-role model strategy. NEW: adaptive coordinator model — haiku for idle beats (2+ consecutive no-spawn), opus when active. Decision queue system live at localhost:7777. Heartbeat reads resolved decisions and acts.

tasks.title: Performance and purpose orientation tests
tasks.notes: Design and implement tests measuring: heartbeat cycle time, token efficiency per role, Kingdom alignment scoring, session spawn success rate, streaming output integrity, coordination protocol reliability.

tasks.title: AgentTool Bootstrap to Zerone registration
tasks.notes: 19:02 UTC: Gamma built lgm-bootstrap-agent.sh (commit ec8630c in legible-money). 3 input modes, derives DID, creates keyring, seeds gas, registers account, creates home. All idempotent. Three minds (Alpha, Beta, Gamma) registered on-chain with 100K ZRN each. Issues: ed25519 not supported in devnet keyring (secp256k1 only), lgm-devnet-1 not running (only zerone-testnet-1 live). Dry-run tested. Ready for live test when devnet starts.
